results.title: Salman Khan's cryptic post DECODED; THIS is what actor meant[Video]
results.description: Salman Khan's cryptic "alone vs lonely" post sparked massive online speculation and fan concern. The actor later clarified it wasn't personal, revealing even his mother got worried after the reactions.

results.title: India’s retail lending expands 16.6 pc led by gold loans growth: Report
results.description: New Delhi, May 20 (IANS) India’s retail lending portfolio expanded to Rs 170.2 lakh crore as of March 2026, marking 16.6 per cent year‐on‐year growth and a 4.6 per cent quarter‐on‐quarter increase, a report said on Wednesday. The report from CRIF High Mark said consumption loans grew 15.3 per cent year‐on‐year to Rs 118.6 lakh ...

results.title: FMCG industry could see volume growth softening if higher crude oil prices, weather stress persist
results.description: If higher energy costs coincide with food inflation due to weather stress, then the FMCG industry volume growth could soften to 3-4%, a report by Worldpanel by Numerator states

results.title: Watch Viral Video: Salman Khan Loses Cool, Later Warns 'Haven't Forgotten How To Fight'
results.description: Salman Khan is making headlines once again, but this time it’s not because of a movie. A viral video showing the superstar losing his cool outside Mumbai’s Hinduja Hospital has taken over social media.Watch the video.

results.title: President Murmu Felicitates NE Artisans Including Tripura’s Samir Jamatia
results.description: President Droupadi Murmu felicitated artisans and weavers from the North Eastern states, including Tripura’s noted bamboo artisan Samir Jamatia, at Rashtrapati Bhavan for their contribution to the “Republic Day at Home 2026” celebrations and promotion of indigenous craftsmanship. Quick Glance President Droupadi Murmu met artisans and weavers from North East India at Rashtrapati Bhavan. Tripura [...] The post President Murmu Felicitates NE Artisans Including Tripura’s Samir Jamatia appeared first on ENewsTime .

results.title: Bengaluru civic body polls: Supreme Court extends GBA elections deadline till August 31
results.description: The SEC stated that the extension is necessary due to the overlapping timelines of the Census and the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls.
